testsuite.name: 三级策略测试

testcase.name: 第三级: 外部服务抛出异常时，使用默认值
第三级: 外部获取失败时，使用默认值
第一级: 入参已包含所有特征时，直接返回

testsuite.system-out: 21:27:27.451 [ForkJoinPool.commonPool-worker-1] ERROR com.example.ruleengine.service.FeatureProviderService -- Failed to call external feature platform org.mockito.exceptions.misusing.PotentialStubbingProblem: Strict stubbing argument mismatch. Please check: - this invocation of 'postForObject' method: restTemplate.postForObject( "http://feature-platform/api/features", [risk_score], interface java.util.Map ); -> at com.example.ruleengine.service.FeatureProviderService.fetchExternalFeatures(FeatureProviderService.java:150) - has following stubbing(s) with different arguments: 1. restTemplate.postForObject(null, null, null); -> at com.example.ruleengine.service.FeatureProviderServiceTest$ThreeLevelStrategyTests.shouldFallbackToDefaultWhenExternalThrowsException(FeatureProviderServiceTest.java:117) Typically, stubbing argument mismatch indicates user mistake when writing tests. Mockito fails early so that you can debug potential problem easily. However, there are legit scenarios when this exception generates false negative signal: - stubbing the same method multiple times using 'given().will()' or 'when().then()' API Please use 'will().given()' or 'doReturn().when()' API for stubbing. - stubbed method is intentionally invoked with different arguments by code under test Please use default or 'silent' JUnit Rule (equivalent of Strictness.LENIENT). For more information see javadoc for PotentialStubbingProblem class. at org.springframework.web.client.RestTemplate.postForObject(RestTemplate.java:504) at com.example.ruleengine.service.FeatureProviderService.fetchExternalFeatures(FeatureProviderService.java:150) at com.example.ruleengine.service.FeatureProviderService.lambda$fetchExternalFeaturesWithTimeout$4(FeatureProviderService.java:127) at java.base/java.util.concurrent.CompletableFuture$AsyncSupply.run(CompletableFuture.java:1768) at java.base/java.util.concurrent.CompletableFuture$AsyncSupply.exec(CompletableFuture.java:1760) at java.base/java.util.concurrent.ForkJoinTask.doExec(ForkJoinTask.java:373) at java.base/java.util.concurrent.ForkJoinPool$WorkQueue.topLevelExec(ForkJoinPool.java:1182) at java.base/java.util.concurrent.ForkJoinPool.scan(ForkJoinPool.java:1655) at java.base/java.util.concurrent.ForkJoinPool.runWorker(ForkJoinPool.java:1622) at java.base/java.util.concurrent.ForkJoinWorkerThread.run(ForkJoinWorkerThread.java:165) 21:27:27.454 [ForkJoinPool.commonPool-worker-1] ERROR com.example.ruleengine.service.FeatureProviderService -- Failed to call external feature platform org.mockito.exceptions.misusing.PotentialStubbingProblem: Strict stubbing argument mismatch. Please check: - this invocation of 'postForObject' method: restTemplate.postForObject( "http://feature-platform/api/features", [user_age, user_level], interface java.util.Map ); -> at com.example.ruleengine.service.FeatureProviderService.fetchExternalFeatures(FeatureProviderService.java:150) - has following stubbing(s) with different arguments: 1. restTemplate.postForObject(null, null, null); -> at com.example.ruleengine.service.FeatureProviderServiceTest$ThreeLevelStrategyTests.shouldFallbackToDefaultWhenExternalFails(FeatureProviderServiceTest.java:92) Typically, stubbing argument mismatch indicates user mistake when writing tests. Mockito fails early so that you can debug potential problem easily. However, there are legit scenarios when this exception generates false negative signal: - stubbing the same method multiple times using 'given().will()' or 'when().then()' API Please use 'will().given()' or 'doReturn().when()' API for stubbing. - stubbed method is intentionally invoked with different arguments by code under test Please use default or 'silent' JUnit Rule (equivalent of Strictness.LENIENT). For more information see javadoc for PotentialStubbingProblem class. at org.springframework.web.client.RestTemplate.postForObject(RestTemplate.java:504) at com.example.ruleengine.service.FeatureProviderService.fetchExternalFeatures(FeatureProviderService.java:150) at com.example.ruleengine.service.FeatureProviderService.lambda$fetchExternalFeaturesWithTimeout$4(FeatureProviderService.java:127) at java.base/java.util.concurrent.CompletableFuture$AsyncSupply.run(CompletableFuture.java:1768) at java.base/java.util.concurrent.CompletableFuture$AsyncSupply.exec(CompletableFuture.java:1760) at java.base/java.util.concurrent.ForkJoinTask.doExec(ForkJoinTask.java:373) at java.base/java.util.concurrent.ForkJoinPool$WorkQueue.topLevelExec(ForkJoinPool.java:1182) at java.base/java.util.concurrent.ForkJoinPool.scan(ForkJoinPool.java:1655) at java.base/java.util.concurrent.ForkJoinPool.runWorker(ForkJoinPool.java:1622) at java.base/java.util.concurrent.ForkJoinWorkerThread.run(ForkJoinWorkerThread.java:165)
